turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I'm calling about a payment receipt. I paid last week but haven't received any receipt. Is this normal?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Apologies for that. Could I get your name and the approximate date of payment?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Harish Menon. I paid on... I think it was the 14th. It was for a cardiology OPD visit.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check that. Yes, I can see a payment record for Harish Menon on the 14th for the cardiology OPD — amount 1,500 rupees. Shall I send the receipt to your email or SMS?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Receipt sent to hmenon77@gmail.com. You should receive it within a few minutes. Anything else?
